# Setupr

> Setupr is a business setup platform for India. We help freelancers, consultants, and founders register their company, get GST and MSME, build a website, and stay compliant. One platform, no CA chasing, no vendor chaos.

Setupr handles Indian business formation end to end: Private Limited, LLP, OPC, Partnership, and Proprietorship registration; PAN, TAN, GST, MSME, Trade License, and Shop Establishment; trademark filing; domain, email, website, and payment gateway setup; plus ongoing compliance support. We also run a cloud software marketplace for Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Adobe, AWS, and Zoho.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Setupr and the full business setup journey.
- [Services](/services): Full catalog of registration, digital, and compliance services.
- [About](/about): Who we are and how we work.
- [Contact](/contact): Talk to the Setupr team.
- [Team](/team): The people behind Setupr.
- [Career](/career): Open roles at Setupr.
- [Intake](/intake): Start your setup with a guided intake form.
- [Apply for a loan](/apply-loan): Business loan assistance for founders.
